rankings.notes: Carlson #19 undergrad business (US News 2026), #6 public. National rank ~66-70 but not confirmed.

business_program.label: Carlson direct admit (estimated)
business_program.source_note: Carlson does not publish a separate rate. ~45% estimated — meaningfully more selective than 80% university-wide. Carlson freshman profile: ACT 28-32, GPA 3.7-4.0.

University of Minnesota-Twin Cities.business_program_note: Carlson School of Management — apply direct via UMN application. #19 undergrad business (US News 2026), #6 public.

admit_profile.program_admit_notes: Carlson School of Management — direct admit via UMN application. More selective than university-wide rate. ACT 28-32, GPA 3.7-4.0 typical Carlson freshman profile. Test-optional through Fall 2027.

rankings.notes: US News national #158 (confirmed). Opus #64 undergrad business per Poets & Quants. Princeton Review #11 entrepreneurship (not US News).

business_program.label: Opus College of Business
